summary: Nice recording of a rain‑soaked standard show that includes the quirky Barney on bass during 'Iko', solid but not a top‑year performance.
review: Both reviewers rate this 1993 April show four stars, noting a decent performance and a pleasant sound despite heavy rain. The recording is praised as “nice,” capturing the atmosphere, while the set is described as standard with the memorable anecdote of Barney the Purple Dinosaur playing bass on 'Iko'. It’s enjoyable but not highlighted as one of the year’s best shows.

ai_rating.rationale: Two consistent 4‑star reviews point to a solid musical performance and good recording quality, though reviewers note better shows exist from the same year.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as a "nice recording" despite heavy rain; no specific issues reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Standard set with typical pacing; rain added ambient background but did not detract from overall flow.

band_member_comments.Phil: Mentioned in context of his autobiography and an upcoming show, indicating awareness but no performance critique.
